text:
Once upon a timeless time in a forest called Greenwood, lived a tiny, furry mouse named Whiskers. Whiskers never got big; he was just one-eighth golden retriever. But he loved exploring the woods – well, everything that lurked within.

One tranquil morning, while collecting shiny leaves for a winter nest feast, Whiskers discovered a clearing with a mirror on the ground. Something shimmered there. He scampered closer, and his tiny heart stopped. Every image mirrored his own fluffy self.

Panicked, Whiskers bolted away. Back at home, he nibbled restlessly on some bark. That night, he had an odd dream. In his sleep, he scaled those mirrored heights, discovering birds looking just like him.

Determined, he made his nest near that mirror every night. The creatures he saw began visiting, praising him for his bravery. Soon enough, he had a troop of woodland admirers.

Whiskers was wise. He taught
